content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Perfect Security". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/948/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: Print the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: To solve this problem, we can use the concept of greatest common divisor (GCD). We can calculate the GCD of all the numbers in the array and then find the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal to the GCD.
